.file-embed.background: rgba(251, 240, 210, 0.13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(251, 240, 210, 0.13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(251, 240, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(251, 240, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(251, 240, 210) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(251, 240, 210, 0.13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(230, 239, 244) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(251, 240, 210, 0.13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

pre.language-js.background: rgba(251, 240, 210, 0.13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.language-js.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

thead.background: rgb(221, 219, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
